seoTitle: AutoChips News & Updates | Product Releases & Company News - LiTong
seoDescription: Latest news and updates from AutoChips including new product releases, technology announcements, and company developments. Stay informed with LiTong distributor.

faqs.question: How can I stay updated on AutoChips news and product releases?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides multiple channels to stay updated on AutoChips news including email newsletters, website updates, and social media announcements. Subscribe to our newsletter for regular updates on new product releases, technical articles, and application notes. Follow LiTong on social media for real-time announcements. Contact your LiTong sales representative to be added to our distribution list for AutoChips-specific updates.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong newsletter and follow our social media channels for regular updates.

faqs.question: Where can I find information about new AutoChips product releases?
faqs.answer: New AutoChips product releases are announced on the LiTong website, through email notifications, and at industry trade shows. Each product release includes datasheets, application notes, and evaluation tools. Contact LiTong sales or FAE team for early access information and samples of new products. We also provide technical training sessions for major new product launches.
faqs.decisionGuide: Check LiTong website regularly or contact sales for information about new product releases.

news.title: AutoChips Launches AC7801x Series Automotive MCUs
news.summary: AutoChips announces the new AC7801x series of AEC-Q100 qualified automotive microcontrollers featuring ARM Cortex-M0+ cores, CAN-FD interfaces, and comprehensive peripheral sets for body control applications.
news.content:
AutoChips has officially launched the AC7801x series of automotive microcontrollers, expanding their portfolio of AEC-Q100 qualified products for vehicle electronics. The new series features ARM Cortex-M0+ processors running at up to 48MHz, making them ideal for cost-sensitive body control applications.

Key features of the AC7801x series include:
- AEC-Q100 Grade 1 qualification (-40°C to +125°C)
- Up to 128KB Flash memory with ECC protection
- CAN-FD and LIN interfaces for modern vehicle networking
- 12-bit ADC with up to 16 channels
- Motor control timers with PWM capability
- Low power consumption for always-on applications

The AC7801x series targets body control modules, HVAC control systems, lighting control, and door/seat control applications. With competitive pricing and local technical support through LiTong, these MCUs offer an attractive alternative to international suppliers.

LiTong is now accepting orders for AC7801x samples and evaluation kits. Contact our sales team for pricing and availability information.

news.title: AutoChips Achieves ASIL-D Certification for AC7840x Series
news.summary: AutoChips announces ASIL-D functional safety certification for the AC7840x series automotive MCUs, enabling safety-critical applications including electric power steering and braking systems.
news.content:
AutoChips has achieved ASIL-D functional safety certification for their AC7840x series automotive microcontrollers, marking a significant milestone in their automotive semiconductor portfolio. The certification was granted following comprehensive assessment per ISO 26262 standard.

The AC7840x series features:
- ARM Cortex-M4F processor with DSP and FPU
- Dual-core lockstep configuration for safety
- ECC protection on Flash and SRAM
- Comprehensive hardware safety mechanisms
- Safety documentation including FMEDA and safety manual

This certification enables AutoChips MCUs to be used in safety-critical automotive applications including electric power steering, braking systems, and battery management systems. The ASIL-D certification demonstrates AutoChips' commitment to meeting the highest automotive safety standards.

LiTong provides comprehensive support for ASIL-D applications including safety consulting, software development support, and system integration assistance. Contact our FAE team for safety documentation and design guidance.

news.title: AutoChips Expands Motor Driver Portfolio with New BLDC Solutions
news.summary: AutoChips expands their motor driver IC portfolio with new BLDC motor drivers featuring sensorless commutation, integrated protection, and AEC-Q100 qualification for automotive fan and pump applications.
news.content:
AutoChips has expanded their motor driver IC portfolio with the introduction of new brushless DC (BLDC) motor drivers designed specifically for automotive applications. The new devices feature integrated sensorless commutation, eliminating the need for Hall sensors and reducing system cost.

Key features of the new motor drivers:
- 6V to 60V supply voltage range
- Up to 10A peak output current
- Integrated sensorless BEMF detection
- Programmable PWM speed control
- Comprehensive protection features
- AEC-Q100 Grade 1 qualification

The new motor drivers target automotive cooling fans, HVAC blowers, water pumps, and oil pump applications. With integrated protection features including over-current, over-temperature, and locked-rotor detection, these drivers provide reliable operation in harsh automotive environments.

LiTong provides reference designs and motor control software to accelerate customer development. Contact our sales team for samples and evaluation kits.

news.title: LiTong Strengthens Partnership with AutoChips for Automotive Semiconductor Distribution
news.summary: LiTong announces expanded partnership with AutoChips to provide comprehensive distribution and technical support for automotive MCUs, power management ICs, and motor drivers in the Chinese market.
news.content:
LiTong Electronics is pleased to announce an expanded partnership with AutoChips, a leading Chinese automotive semiconductor company. This strengthened partnership enhances LiTong's ability to provide comprehensive distribution and technical support for AutoChips products.

Under the expanded partnership, LiTong will:
- Maintain increased inventory of popular AutoChips products
- Provide enhanced technical support through trained FAE team
- Offer reference designs and application support
- Conduct joint customer training and workshops
- Support new product introductions and roadmaps

The partnership focuses on supporting the growing demand for domestic automotive semiconductors in China. With AutoChips' AEC-Q100 qualified products and LiTong's distribution network, customers benefit from reliable supply, competitive pricing, and local technical support.

Contact LiTong sales team for information about AutoChips products and support services.
